response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song performance by Hakos Baelz starting at 00:23.000, with on-screen credits identifying the song 'winning the soul' and composer Makoto Miyazaki. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'winning the soul' by Makoto Miyazaki. 3. Retrieved Japanese lyrics and English translation. 4. Mapped scenes based on the performance and the talk section, and constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A live performance video featuring VTuber Hakos Baelz singing 'winning the soul' (originally by Makoto Miyazaki), followed by a talking segment where she discusses her 'Not Birthday' live event.

scenes.description: The video begins with the stage setting up, with lights, a large audience in the dark, and a countdown. No vocal music is playing.
Performance of the song 'winning the soul'. Hakos Baelz performs on stage with backup dancers. The on-screen text identifies the music and lyrics by Makoto Miyazaki.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
光の速さで駆け抜ける衝動は
何を犠牲にしても叶えたい強さの覚悟
(No fear) 一度きりの
(Trust you) この瞬間に
賭けてみろ 自分を信じて

時には運だって必要と言うのなら
宿命の旋律も引き寄せてもみせよう
走れ 今を まだ終われ
辿り着きたい場所があるから
その先へと進め
涙さえも強く胸に抱きしめ
そこから始まるストーリー
果てしなく続く
Winning the soul

掴め 今を変えたいなら
描いた夢を未来に掲げ
恐れないで挑め

走れ 今を まだ終われ
辿り着きたい場所があるから
その先へと進め
涙さえも強く胸に抱きしめ
そこから始まるストーリー
果てしなく続く
Winning the soul

Woh woh woh
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The impulse that races past at the speed of light
Means readiness for the strength that I want to achieve at any cost.
(No fear) Try risking yourself in this moment
(Trust you) That will never happen again.

If you say that sometimes luck is necessary,
Then I will show you how to pull even the melody of fate to myself.
Run, I still can't finish this present,
Because there is a place I want to reach.
Advance to what lies beyond,
Holding even your tears firmly in your chest.
The story that begins from there,
Will continue endlessly.
Winning the soul.

Grab it, if you want to change the present.
Raise the dream you drew into the future,
And don't be afraid to challenge it.

Run, I still can't finish this present,
Because there is a place I want to reach.
Advance to what lies beyond,
Holding even your tears firmly in your chest.
The story that begins from there,
Will continue endlessly.
Winning the soul.

Woh, woh, woh.

scenes.description: The song ends, and the video transitions to a talk segment featuring Hakos Baelz, who introduces herself, interacts with the audience, and discusses her 'Not Birthday' live event.
